_comment: RS plugin theme overlay. Top-level keys are the shared factory_ui_visage schema, applied to the shared Theme via Theme::applyOverlay (LIVE hot-reload). The shared 'donut + needle' knob (design reference 2026-07-17) is now the factory-wide default, so no knob overlay is needed here — only the 16px card radius. The 'rs' object is RS-specific extras consumed by rs_ui::RsTheme (see RsTheme.h RsExtras). The 'rs.analyzer.*' values follow the design reference (they supersede the earlier kV201Style transcription) — a human still signs off on them.

palette._note_teal: teal (#45b8ac) is now the shared palette.positive (ON toggles / Listen / GR / reduction curtain)

analyzer._signoff: PENDING — v2.1.0 (AnalyzerStyle.h kV201Style, transcribed from SuppressionCurveComponent.h). Teal curtain hangs from the 0 dB gridline (AreaFromZero) with a 0.8/1px stroke; PRE = muted-taupe filled area (0.22->0.02), no line; POST = thin solid coral line; combined reduction PROFILE = SOLID coral (2.2px) + soft glow (0.22/5px) through the node dots; per-node = translucent fill (0.12) + stroke (0.7) under the glow.
